title: anacamptis × gennarii
intro: Anacamptis × gennarii, also known as the Gennari's orchid, is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Anacamptis coriophora and Orchis italica. Traditionally, the Gennari's orchid has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the Gennari's orchid can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to the lack of extensive scientific research on its efficacy and safety.
